patches.name: Disable Bugsnag Telemetry
patches.description: Disables Bugsnag crash reporting and analytics.

patches.name: Disable General Telemetry
patches.description: Disables various analytics and tracking tasks.

patches.name: Disable Telemetry
patches.description: Disables AppStartTracker and other telemetry points.

patches.name: Make UI look like Pro
patches.description: Changes the app title to 'Moon+ Reader Pro' and removes the 'Remove Ads' button from the drawer.

patches.name: Remove Ads
patches.description: Disables all ad feature toggles globally.

patches.name: Remove Promoted Pins
patches.description: Disables ad detection logic globally. Safe for Home feed.

patches.name: Unlock CalcNote Pro
patches.description: Unlocks all Pro features and removes ads.

patches.name: Unlock Moon+ Reader Pro
patches.description: Unlocks Pro features including PDF support, ad-free experience, and more.

patches.name: Unlock Symfonium
patches.description: Unlocks the trial version of Symfonium.
